nasb.text: “Let everyone be on guard against his neighbor, And do not trust any brother; Because every brother deals craftily, And every neighbor goes about as a slanderer.

esv.text: Let everyone beware of his neighbor, and put no trust in any brother, for every brother is a deceiver, and every neighbor goes about as a slanderer.

cnv.text: “你們各人要提防自己的鄰舍， 不要信靠兄弟； 因為每一個兄弟都在欺騙人， 每一個鄰舍都搬弄是非。

ccb.text: 你们要提防邻居， 不要信赖弟兄， 因为弟兄诡计多端， 邻居满口是非。
